ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the player */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., Forward, Defense) */,
  "shooting_hand" TEXT /* Shooting hand of the player (e.g., Left, Right) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player is currently on */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic entry */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player associated with the statistics */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the player */,
  "ppg" REAL /* Average points per game (PPG) */,
  "shots_taken" INTEGER /* Total number of shots taken by the player */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Total number of penalties committed by the player */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "game_minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played by the player in the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Mascot of the team */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the team plays */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Home team identifier */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Away team identifier */,
  "score" TEXT /* Final score of the game */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee for the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the coach */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the coach is associated with */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the coach (e.g., Head Coach, Assistant Coach) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date the coach's contract was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of coaching experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_injury" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player who sustained the injury */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Description of the type of injury */,
  "date_reported" TEXT /* Date when the injury was reported */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Estimated duration of recovery in days */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Current status of the injury recovery (e.g., In Progress, Recovered) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_injury_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "team_standings" (
  "standing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the standings record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties in the season */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Total points accumulated by the team */,
  "goals_for" INTEGER /* Total goals scored by the team */,
  "goals_against" INTEGER /* Total goals conceded by the team */,
  "goal_difference" INTEGER /* Difference between goals scored and goals conceded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_team_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schedules" (
  "schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the schedule entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team for the scheduled game */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the scheduled game */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of the scheduled game */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the scheduled game (home or away) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the scheduled game (e.g., Scheduled, Postponed, Completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_schedules_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "scouts" (
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scout */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the scout */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the scout */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the scout is associated with */,
  "scouting_role" TEXT /* Role of the scout (e.g., Head Scout, Junior Scout) */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the scout was hired */,
  "date_released" TEXT /* Date the scout's contract was terminated (if applicable) */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of scouting experience */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recruits" (
  "recruit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recruit */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the recruit */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the recruit */,
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Reference to statistics of the recruit */,
  "scout_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the scout who evaluated the recruit */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the recruit was evaluated */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the recruit */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the recruit */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the recruit in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the recruit in kilograms */,
  "contract_status" TEXT /* Current contract status of the recruit (e.g., Available, Signed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recruit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruits_stat_id FOREIGN KEY ("stat_id") REFERENCES statistics ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recruits_scout_id FOREIGN KEY ("scout_id") REFERENCES scouts ("scout_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., admin, coach, scout) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* JSON object listing the permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player receiving the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "date_awarded" TEXT /* Date when the award was given */,
  "award_description" TEXT /* Description of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)
